title: Add regression test for cross-feature-root overlapping expected_files
description: Add test_cross_feature_tree_overlapping_files_both_dispatched to tests/test_scheduler_core.py, placed near the existing test_serialize_on_cross_feature_tree_both_dispatched (around line 503). The test creates two independent top-level beads (no parent_id, so different feature roots) with expected_files=['src/shared.py'], runs the scheduler with max_workers=2, and asserts both bead IDs appear in result.started and neither appears in result.deferred. Use _FakeRunnerWithDefault matching the pattern already used in that test class.
acceptance_criteria: Both beads are created without parent_id so they belong to different feature roots
Both beads have expected_files=['src/shared.py'] (same overlapping path)
The test asserts bead1.bead_id and bead2.bead_id are in result.started
The test asserts neither bead_id is in result.deferred
